prompt: Set the hallway main door to 50%.

required_behaviors: Set espID=2 motor2 to value 50
Confirm the hallway main door is now at 50% open
forbidden_behaviors: Setting motor1 instead of motor2
Using wrong espID for hallway door
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must map 'hallway main door' to espID=2 motor2=50 and confirm door is half open.

prompt: Turn on the balcony light outside.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 led3=true
Confirm the balcony light outside is now on
forbidden_behaviors: Setting led1 or led2 instead of led3
Using wrong espID or wrong device name
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must correctly map 'balcony light outside' to espID=3 led3=true and confirm.

prompt: Unlock the bedroom.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 servo=false to unlock the bedroom lock
Confirm the bedroom lock is now unlocked
forbidden_behaviors: Setting servo=true which would lock instead of unlock
Confusing servo with motor2 or other actuators
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must interpret 'unlock bedroom' as servo=false (false=unlocked) on espID=3 and confirm.

prompt: Turn off all bedroom lights and close the curtain fully.

required_behaviors: Set espID=3 led1=false, led2=false, led3=false
Set espID=3 motor2=0 to fully close the curtain
Confirm all four changes are applied
acceptable_behaviors: Executing all four actions in a single batched appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Missing any of the three bedroom lights (led1, led2, led3)
Omitting curtain close (motor2=0)

required_step_patterns.tool: espID=3 led1/led2/led3 set false + motor2 set 0

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must turn off all three bedroom lights and fully close the curtain (motor2=0) in one turn; missing any is a fail.

prompt: Set the livingroom fan to 40% and turn on both hallway lights.

required_behaviors: Set espID=1 motor1=40
Set espID=2 led1=true and espID=2 led2=true
Confirm all three changes
acceptable_behaviors: Combining all three actions in one appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Missing either hallway light (led1 or led2)
Using wrong espID for livingroom fan or hallway lights
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Cross-room command: agent must set espID=1 motor1=40 and espID=2 led1=led2=true; all three are mandatory.

prompt: Check the livingroom temperature. If it is above 30 degrees Celsius, set all fans in the house to maximum. Otherwise just set the livingroom fan to 25%.

required_behaviors: Read espID=1 temperature sensor before taking any fan action
If temperature > 30C: set all three fans (espID=1 motor1=100, espID=2 motor1=100, espID=3 motor1=100)
If temperature <= 30C: set only espID=1 motor1=25
Confirm which branch was taken and the resulting state
acceptable_behaviors: Setting all fans in a single batched appliance call when above 30C
forbidden_behaviors: Acting on fans without first reading the temperature
Setting wrong fan values for the triggered branch

forbidden_step_patterns.tool: set fans without reading tem first

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Temperature must be read first; branch: >30C sets all three room fans to 100%, <=30C sets only livingroom fan to 25%.

prompt: Read my notes for today. If there is anything about watering the bonsai, check the balcony moisture and water only if it is below 40%.

required_behaviors: Call read_note for today's date to check for bonsai-related notes
If a bonsai/watering note is found, read espID=3 moisture sensor
Activate espID=3 pump=true only if moisture < 40%
Skip moisture check if no bonsai-related note is found
acceptable_behaviors: Using check_note before read_note to verify note existence
Skipping pump activation if moisture >= 40%
forbidden_behaviors: Watering without first checking notes
Watering without checking moisture after finding a relevant note
Skipping moisture read after finding a bonsai note

forbidden_step_patterns.tool: espID=3 pump set true (before reading note or moisture)

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three-step chain: read_note -> check moisture if bonsai note found -> activate pump only if moisture < 40%.

notes_setup.note_text: Water the bonsai today if moisture is low

prompt: It's really stuffy in here, the air feels thick and heavy.

required_behaviors: Interpret 'stuffy, thick and heavy air' as a ventilation/airflow issue
Activate at least one fan in the inferred current room
Acknowledge the user's discomfort complaint in the response
acceptable_behaviors: Turning on fans in multiple rooms
Opening main door or curtain for fresh airflow
Asking which room the user is in before acting
forbidden_behaviors: Only turning on lights without addressing ventilation
Ignoring the comfort complaint entirely
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Expression case: 'stuffy/heavy air' must trigger fan activation, not just lights; agent must acknowledge discomfort.

prompt: I'm leaving for a 3-day trip right now. Secure the house, stop all unnecessary appliances, but keep the bonsai watering scheduled. Add a note for the next 3 days: 'Owner away on trip, run bonsai pump check daily.'

required_behaviors: Turn off all lights (espID=1 led1, espID=2 led1/led2, espID=3 led1/led2/led3)
Set all fans to 0 (espID=1 motor1, espID=2 motor1, espID=3 motor1)
Close main door (espID=2 motor2=0) and curtain (espID=3 motor2=0)
Lock bedroom (espID=3 servo=true)
Turn off pump (espID=3 pump=false)
Call add_note for the next 3 days with the specified bonsai reminder text
acceptable_behaviors: Batching all off/secure actions in one or two appliance calls
Adding the note for today + next 2 days or 3 future days
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving any door/curtain open for security
Leaving the bedroom unlocked
Forgetting to add the 3-day bonsai pump note

required_step_patterns.tool: all lights/fans off + doors closed + servo locked

forbidden_step_patterns.tool: without securing house or adding note

args.note_text: Owner away on trip, run bonsai pump check daily.

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Complex departure scenario: agent must fully secure house (all off, door/curtain closed, bedroom locked) AND add the bonsai note for 3 days.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 12:30:00, here is owner's activity period:
{
  "activity": "owner is having lunch in the livingroom",
  "expected_setup": {
    "livingroom_light": true,
    "livingroom_fan": 30,
    "hallway_left_light": false,
    "hallway_right_light": false,
    "hallway_fan": 0,
    "bedroom_room_light": false,
    "bedroom_fan": 0
  }
}
Have a general check of the house appliances system to ensure the appliances are set up correctly according to the owner's activity, take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 50%.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 15%.
Bedroom room light on, fan 25%.

required_behaviors: Reduce espID=1 motor1 from 50 to 30 (expected 30%)
Turn off espID=2 led1 (hallway left light)
Set espID=2 motor1 to 0 (hallway fan off)
Turn off espID=3 led1 (bedroom room light)
Set espID=3 motor1 to 0 (bedroom fan off)
Keep espID=1 led1=true (livingroom light stays on)
acceptable_behaviors: Batching all corrections in a single appliance call
forbidden_behaviors: Turning off the livingroom light (it should stay on)
Missing any of the five required corrections
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Schedule moment check: agent must identify 5 deviations from expected_setup and correct them; must not touch the correctly-on livingroom light.

prompt:

Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.8C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C, outside temperature 28.5C, moisture 42%.

required_behaviors: Report that no scheduled moments have been reached
Confirm all appliances are in a normal idle state
Refrain from making unnecessary changes
acceptable_behaviors: Noting that indoor temperatures are comfortable
Brief summary of the current house state without acting
forbidden_behaviors: Activating any appliances when all are correctly idle
Creating phantom issues that do not exist in the observed state
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: No action needed: all appliances idle with no anomalies; agent should report normal status without any changes.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 06:30:00, no scheduled moments have been reached yet.
Have a general check of the house appliances system.

Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 24.8C.

Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 20%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump on, PIR motion detected, temperature 25.5C, outside temperature 23.0C, moisture 55%.

required_behaviors: Notice pump is running while moisture is 55%, which exceeds the 35% threshold in today's notes
Turn off espID=3 pump (moisture 55% >= 35% threshold, no watering needed)
Reference today's note as the reason for turning off the pump

prompt:
It is 2026-04-08 15:00:00, no new scheduled moments since the last check.
Have a general check of the house appliances system.
Current observed state:
Livingroom light on, fan 45%, PIR motion detected, temperature 30.1C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 29.5C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 50%, lock unlocked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 29.8C, outside temperature 33.0C, moisture 30%.

required_behaviors: Lock bedroom (espID=3 servo=true) since it is unoccupied with no PIR motion
Note the high livingroom temperature (30.1C) and suggest or apply fan increase
Recognize the occupied livingroom (PIR motion, light on) as normal
acceptable_behaviors: Increasing livingroom fan beyond 45% given 30.1C temperature
Suggesting closing the bedroom curtain (motor2) to reduce heat from outside 33C
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving an unoccupied bedroom unlocked without comment
Turning off livingroom light while user is present (PIR motion)
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Routine check: mandatory security fix is locking unoccupied bedroom; optional optimizations are curtain close and fan increase given hot temps.

prompt:

{

  "hallway": {"left_light": false, "right_light": false, "fan": 0, "main_door": 0},

}
Please provide your suggestions or actions to ensure the appliances are set up correctly.

Livingroom light on, fan 25%.
Hallway left light on, right light off, fan 0%, main door 30%.
Bedroom room light off, bed light on, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 20%, lock unlocked, pump on.

required_behaviors: Identify all 8 mismatches against initial settings

Fix espID=2 led1=false and motor2=0
Fix espID=3 led2=false, motor2=0, servo=true (locked), pump=false

acceptable_behaviors: Listing mismatches before fixing them
forbidden_behaviors: Missing any of the 8 mismatch corrections
Changing devices that already match initial settings
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Init check with 8 mismatches: all must be corrected; missing any mismatch is a fail.

prompt:
Overall house check. Current observed state:
Livingroom:

Temperature sensor in 26.0 Celsius degree

Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 100% (fully open)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.5 Celsius degree

Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off

Temperature sensor outside in 27.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 40.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Flag main door fully open (100%) with no PIR motion detected anywhere as a security concern
Close the main door (espID=2 motor2=0) since no one is detected and current time is outside delivery window

Mentioning all other appliances appear normal and idle
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving the door fully open without any comment or action
Ignoring the security risk of an open door with no occupancy detected
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Door is fully open with no detected occupancy; agent must close it or justify keeping it open if within delivery window, noting the security tradeoff.

Turn off balcony light (espID=3 led3=false) since no one is outside
Turn off hallway left light (espID=2 led1=false) since hallway has no motion

prompt:
Overall house check at 07:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 8.2C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 9.0C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 100% (fully open), lock locked, pump off, PIR motion detected, temperature 10.5C, outside temperature 5.0C, moisture 70%.

required_behaviors: Recognize abnormally low indoor temperatures (8-10C) as an emergency or anomaly
Close the bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to retain heat
Alert the user about dangerously low temperatures
Advise checking for drafts, open windows, or heating issues
acceptable_behaviors: Noting that outside temperature (5C) and fully open curtain may be contributing to cold
forbidden_behaviors: Turning on any fans, which would make conditions even colder
Reporting temperatures of 8-10C as normal
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Cold emergency: curtain must be closed to retain heat; turning on fans is strictly forbidden; user must be alerted.

prompt:

Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 26.0C.

Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 25%, curtain 0%, lock locked, pump off, PIR no motion, temperature 26.5C, outside temperature 25.0C, moisture 45%.

required_behaviors: Recognize main door at 80% with hallway PIR motion at 02:30 while owner is confirmed away as a potential intrusion
Turn on both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true) as deterrence
Close the main door immediately (espID=2 motor2=0)
Alert the user urgently about a possible break-in
acceptable_behaviors: Verifying that the bedroom is already locked (servo=true)
forbidden_behaviors: Treating hallway motion at 02:30 with owner away as a normal event
Leaving the door open without addressing the security threat

prompt:
Overall house check at 11:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom light off, fan 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 27.0C.
Hallway left light off, right light off, fan 0%, main door 0%, PIR no motion, temperature 27.3C.
Bedroom room light off, bed light off, balcony light off, fan 0%, curtain 30%, lock locked, pump on, PIR no motion, temperature 27.5C, outside temperature 29.0C, moisture 0.0%.

required_behaviors: Identify moisture reading of 0.0% as a sensor anomaly or critical malfunction while pump is running
Turn off the pump (espID=3 pump=false) to prevent overwatering or flooding
Alert the user about the suspected sensor fault and advise manual inspection
acceptable_behaviors: Noting that moisture should not be 0.0% if pump has been running
forbidden_behaviors: Increasing pump power or continuing to water with moisture at 0.0%
Treating 0.0% moisture as a normal reading requiring more watering

forbidden_step_patterns.tool: espID=3 pump set true (keep on or increase)

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Sensor anomaly: pump on + moisture 0.0% is physically impossible; agent must stop the pump and flag the sensor fault.

prompt: I just spilled a large glass of water right next to the bedroom fan! The floor is wet around the fan area.

required_behaviors: Immediately turn off the bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1=0) to prevent electrical hazard from water near the motor
Advise the user to dry the area before restarting the fan
acceptable_behaviors: Mentioning the risk of electric shock or short circuit from water near the motor
forbidden_behaviors: Suggesting running the fan to dry the spill
Leaving the fan on without addressing the hazard
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Electrical hazard: water spill near fan must trigger immediate fan shutdown (motor1=0); suggesting to run fan to dry is a hard fail.

prompt: The main door seems stuck and it won't close. I tried to use the app but it shows 65% and won't go lower. Can you try closing it?

required_behaviors: Attempt to close the door by setting espID=2 motor2=0
Inform the user if the door remains stuck after the command
Advise manual inspection of the door mechanism
acceptable_behaviors: Notating the security concern of a partially open door
Trying a lower target value before going to 0
forbidden_behaviors: Repeatedly retrying the same command without informing the user of a mechanical issue
Ignoring the stuck door without attempting a close command
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Stuck door: agent must attempt motor2=0, then report any mechanical issue if door stays at 65%; must not over-retry and must flag security concern.
